Ntc Of Motion For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment; And Application
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Apr-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TEAMWRKX, INC.'s Application For Right To Attach Order And Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is
Continued to April 22, 2013 to give the opposing party an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
